name: Wyrmwood Glade
description: A rare break in the canopy. Pale light falls on a long strip of open ground running east to west — the first real path you've seen in the wood. The forest south is impenetrably dense. No way through.
ambient: Light filters down through the gap overhead.

interaction_rules.text: You close your eyes and murmur a quiet prayer. For a heartbeat, the room feels still enough to listen.
Your voice drifts through the area and fades into the distance. No one applauds, but it lifts your spirits.
